positive: Stylized mythological animal portrait, featuring a majestic celestial guardian creature composed of interlocking geometric stained glass segments and wispy gold filaments. The creature is centered and symmetrical, viewed in profile, standing on a stylized rococo pillar. Emphasize clean silhouettes, strong contrast between deep sapphire blue and glowing amber/gold light sources. High contrast, bold lines, minimalist maximalism, symmetrical composition, ethereal glow, digital art, ornate etching style, perfect symmetry, ready for textile printing, --v 6.0
